snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
snippet.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal — where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor — the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni — accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat
Tridha Choudhary as Saara
Mrinal Kulkarni as Prabha Nadkarni
Harsimran Oberoi as Ipshita Das
Rockey Raina as Sohraab
Archana Iyer as Vicky’s Mother
Bipin Nadkarni as Bipin Chaudhary
Nikhil Nanda as M.S. Golwalkar

Crew
Directed by Abhijeet Mohan Warang
Nikhil Nanda Motion Pictures & Neem Tree Entertainment Presents
Produced by Nikhil Nanda & Sanjay Dutt
Co-Producers: Puneet Nanda, Dr. Deepak Singh, Gaurav Dubey, Ujjwal Anand
Written by Utkarsh Naithani

snippet.title: Tera Ho Jaun | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai | Varun Dhawan, Pooja Hegde | WNC | Stebin, Jonita, Vayu
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Tera Ho Jaun from Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, featuring the beautiful chemistry of Varun Dhawan and Pooja Hegde. ❤️✨Sung by Stebin Ben and Jonita Gandhi, this romantic love song is composed by White Noise Collectives with heartfelt lyrics by Vayu.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

#HaiJawaniTohIshqHonaHai in cinemas on 5th June 2026.

Song Details : 
Singer: Stebin Ben & Jonita Gandhi
Lyrics: Vayu
Music: White Noise Collectives
Programmed & Arranged: Abhishek Singh @ White Noise Collectives 
Backing Vocals - Akanksha Sethi
Music Production Head: Romil Ved
Recording Engineer - Susmeet Rewaskar @ White Noise Collectives
Mixed & Mastered: Swar Mehta
Director Of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly

Movie Credits : 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy.
Head Of Production Varsha Taurani
Co-Producer Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
Dop Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer Farhad Samji
Music White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali & Gill Machhrai (Classy Beats), Javed–Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics Vayu, Jaira, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Machhrai (Classy Beats), Ip Singh
Director Of Choreography Vijay Ganguly
Editor Ritesh Soni
Production Designer Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director Sunil Rodrigues
Sound Recording & Sound Design Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kaushik
Re-Recording Mixer Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (Uk)
Di Studio Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design House Of Ave
Pr Agency Hype
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd.

Lyrics : 

Bhool Ke Saari Jag Ki Fikrein Paas Tere Main Aaun
Bhool Ke Saari Jag Ki Fikrein Paas Tere Main Aaun
Teri Aankhon Ke Saayon Mein Apni Roshni Paun
Main Bas Tera Hi, Main Bas Tera Hi, Tera Hi Main Ho Jaun…

Khwaab Hai Ya Kismat Hai Tu
Hai Yakeen Mushkil
Kaise Maanu Ki Main Tere
Pyaar Ke Kaabil. 

Khwaab Hai Ya Kismat Hai Tu
Hai Yakeen Mushkil
Kaise Maanu Ki Main Tere
Pyaar Ke Kaabil. 
Isse Badhke Rutba Kya Ke
Main Tera Kehlaun…
Kya Hai Tere, Dil Mein, Keh De
Chain Se So Paun…
Teri Ho Jaun 
Tera Ho Jaun 
Main Bas Tera Hi, Main Bas Tera Hi
Tera Hi main ho jaun…

 #VarunDhawan #PoojaHegde #TeraHoJaun #HaiJawaniTohIshqHonaHai #StebinBen #JonitaGandhi #Vayu #WhiteNoiseCollectives #RomanticSong #LoveSong #HindiSongs #BollywoodSongs #NewSong #RomanticHits #BollywoodMusic #TrendingSong #MusicLovers #LoveAnthem #RomanticVibes #HindiLoveSong

snippet.title: मेरा चाँद मुझे आया है नज़र | Mr. Aashiq | Kumar Sanu Songs | Saif Ali Khan | Twinkle Khanna
snippet.description:
1990 के दशक के सुनहरे दौर से, कुमार सानू की आवाज़ में जादू बिखेरता एक नगमा - 'मेरा चाँद मुझे आया है नज़र'। यह गाना सिर्फ एक धुन नहीं, बल्कि प्यार की गहराईयों में डूबा हुआ एक एहसास है। इस गाने के बोल, संगीत, और कुमार सानू की आवाज़ मिलकर एक ऐसा माहौल बनाते हैं जो सीधे दिल को छू जाता है। यह गाना हमें उस दौर की याद दिलाता है जब प्यार का इज़हार बड़ी सादगी और मासूमियत से किया जाता था।

'मेरा चाँद मुझे आया है नज़र' फिल्म 'मिस्टर आशिक' का एक अनमोल रत्न है, जो आज भी लाखों दिलों में बसा हुआ है। कुमार सानू ने अपनी आवाज़ से इस गाने को अमर बना दिया है। इस गाने में प्यार की तड़प, मिलने की खुशी, और बिछड़ने का गम सब कुछ बड़ी खूबसूरती से पिरोया गया है। यह गाना उन सभी प्रेमियों के लिए एक सौगात है जो अपने प्यार को शब्दों में बयां नहीं कर पाते।



Credits :

Song: Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar
Album: Mr. Aashiq
Artist: Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Jatin-Lalit
Lyricist: Indiwar 



Lyrics :

Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Chhaya hai nasha meri aankho par
Chhaya hai nasha meri aankho par
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar


Mere dil mein hai arma kai kai
Meri chahat hai abhi nayi nayi
Mere dil mein hai arma kai kai
Meri chahat hai abhi nayi nayi
Reh jaye na pyasa pyar mera
Meri baahon mein bhar de yaar mera
Itana sa karam tu kar mujh par
Itana sa karam tu kar mujh par
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar


Abhi labo ko labo ne chhua nahi
Arma koi pura hua nahi
Abhi labo ko labo ne chhua nahi
Arma koi pura hua nahi
Abhi aash ka gulshan khilana hai
Abhi do jismo ko milna hai
Dekhuga abhi main wo manjar
Dekhuga abhi main wo manjar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aaya hai nazar, aaya hai nazar

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया, तो कृपया वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट करके बताएं कि आपका पसंदीदा गाना कौन सा है, और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

snippet.title: Saptadingar Guptodhon (সপ্তডিঙার গুপ্তধন) | Official Trailer | Abir | Arjun | Ishaa | Dhrubo B | SVF
snippet.description:
পুরাণ আর ইতিহাসের হাতছানি কোন রহস্যের পথে নিয়ে যাবে সোনাদা, আবির আর ঝিনুককে?

Presenting the official trailer of #SaptadingarGuptodhon,
A film directed by Dhrubo Banerjee, in cinemas 15th May.

Bookmyshow : https://in.bookmyshow.com/movies/kolkata/saptadingar-guptodhon/ET00438069

Credits : 

Presented By - Shrikant Mohta, Mahendra Soni
Production - Follow Focus Films
Director - Dhrubo Banerjee
Cast- Abir Chatterjee, Arjun Chakrabarty, Ishaa Saha, Kaushik Ganguly
Co-Producers - Vishnu Mohta, Rahul Mohta
Associate Producer - Abhishek Daga
Story & Screenplay - Dhrubo Banerjee, Sugata Guha
Dialogues - Sugata Guha
Music - Indraadip Dasgupta
DOP - Soumik Haldar (ISC)
Editor - Sanglap Bhowmik
Production Design - Shibaji Pal, Bablu Singha
Costume Design - Sanchita Pal Chakraborty
Makeup - Abhijit Das
Production Head - Subhadeep Ghosh
Executive Producers - Asim Kumar Ghosh, Anurag Pati
Production Manager - Sujay Kotal
Associate Directors - Joy Mukherjee, Ishani Mishra
DI Colorist - Debojyoti Ghosh (Edit FX)
Sound Design - Adeep Singh Manki
Sound Mix - Anindit Roy (CAS)
VFX Studios - SVF Studios, Fourth Dimension Visual Effects
Publicity Design - Anonymous
Promo Design - Pratik Banerjee,
Mandar Banerjee

Lyrics :-
Ye bootal bhari bharai ,,
Na hothon say lagai ,,
Gajab toh dekho yaaro ,,
Usne aankho say pillai ,,

Pehle toh najar milaai ,
Dekh kay muskuraayi/ muskaaayi
Gajab toh dekho yaaro ,
Usne aankho say pilaayi ,,


Tujh jaisi na koi teeno lok may , 
Sabkuch lutaa du tere shounk may ,,
Tum or shraab miley hue ho ,,
Rehne ni dete dono hosh may ,,


Chanachal kajraari aankeyy ,,
Haaye shikaari aankehi ,,
Dil pay chalaye churriya 
Teri kataari aankhein ,,

Naagin c haaye julfey ,,
Kaali ghataye julfey ,,
Maaregi toba toba ,,
Teri blaaye julfey ,,

Tootay chaand ka garur ,
Tere cehray ka Noor ,,
Tujhey dekh dekh hota hai deewane ko sarur ,,

Tujh jaisi na koi teeno lok may , 
Sabkuch lutaa du tere shounk may ,,
Tum or shraab miley hue ho ,,
Rehne ni dete dono hosh may ,,
#sharab #himeshreshammiya #manushichhillar #hugel #viral #trending

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip. 

Social Handles
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/odysseymovie
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theodysseymovie
X: https://x.com/odysseymovie
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@odysseymovie
Threads: https://www.threads.net/@theodysseymovie
Official Site: https://www.OdysseyMovie.com
#TheOdysseyMovie

snippet.title: Panna Ki Tamanna Hai 💔 | 90s Bollywood Sad Love Song | Heart Touching Hindi Song 2026
snippet.description:
💔 Panna Ki Tamanna Hai | 90s Bollywood Style Sad Romantic Song | Heart Touching Love Story

अगर आप 90s बॉलीवुड के दिल छू लेने वाले गाने पसंद करते हैं, तो यह गाना आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा…
“Panna Ki Tamanna Hai” एक ऐसी मोहब्बत की कहानी है जो अधूरी रह गई… दर्द, जुदाई और सच्चे प्यार की भावना से भरा हुआ।

🎧 इस गाने में आपको मिलेगा:
• Emotional love story
• 90s Bollywood nostalgic vibes
• Heart touching lyrics & soulful music
• Sad romantic feel जो दिल को छू जाए

❤️ Feel the Pain… Feel the Love… Feel the Song

🎤 Credits:
Singer: Rupa Singh
Music & Lyrics: Sunny Vijay
Label: Sunny Vijay Official

📌 About the Song:
यह गाना एक अधूरी मोहब्बत की कहानी को दर्शाता है, जहाँ प्यार तो सच्चा होता है लेकिन किस्मत साथ नहीं देती…
अगर आपने कभी किसी से सच्चा प्यार किया है, तो यह गाना आपको जरूर relatable लगेगा।

snippet.title: Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer Review by Deeksha Sharma. Bandar Movie Featuring Bobby Deol & Sanya Malhotra Directed by Anurag Kashyap is based on real life Crime thriller which shook bollywood film industry whereas Kartavya Trailer Featuring Saif Ali Khan on Netflix is a Hunt Thriller for Truth which uncovers a dark story with New Villain Lallantop Saurabh Dwivedi. Bandar Teaser Review & Kartavya Trailer Netflix backed by Shahrukh Khan & Red Chillies Reaction would be shared in this Video. Bobby Deol 2.0 with Director Anurag Kashyap or Saif Ali Khan in Action Thriller- What are you most excited for? Do leave Comments below.

#Bandar #BandarTeaser #Kartavya

snippet.title: Gehra Hua - Audio | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Sara Arjun, Shashwat Sachdev, Arijit Singh
snippet.description:
Dive into the full depth of emotions with lyrics that bring every feeling to life.

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
Composed, Produced and arranged by Shashwat Sachdev 
Singer: Arijit Singh, Armaan Khan 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Tu agar meri ye ujaale tere 
Tu agar meri dil hawaale tere 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Laakhon farishton ki hai tu jaan 
Wo poochte hain rehti kahan 
Meri baahon mein rehti unko bataa 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Usne bhi tujhsa dekha kahan 
Hai raunakein wahan tu hai jahan 
Meri baahon mein rehna yehi hai dua 
Tu agar meri hai fasaana tera 
Tu agar meri toh zamaana tera 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Teri mohabbat mein jalna bhi hai 
Aur tujhse bachke hi chalna bhi hai 
Kuch rang apna badalna bhi hai 
Maine dhalna tere rang mein hai sadaa 
Tu chaand hai ik dhadakta hua 
Chori se mujhko hi takta hua 
Seene se lagke chamakta hua 
Meri jannat ka rasta 
Tu hi toh hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহার"-এর অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

இந்த வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடித்திருக்கும் என்று நம்புகிறேன். பிடித்திருந்தால், தயவுசெய்து லைக் செய்து பகிருங்கள்.

1976 ஆம் ஆண்டின் பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டத்தின் பிரிவு 107-இன் கீழ் பதிப்புரிமை மறுப்பு, விமர்சனம், கருத்து, செய்தி அறிக்கை, கற்பித்தல், கல்வி, ஆராய்ச்சி போன்ற நோக்கங்களுக்காக "நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு" அனுமதி வழங்கப்படுகிறது.

நியாயமான பயன்பாடு என்பது பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டங்களால் அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு பயன்பாடாகும், இல்லையெனில் அது மீறலாகக் கருதப்படலாம்.

ml.description:
പുതിയ വീഡിയോകൾക്കായി ദയവായി സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബുചെയ്യുക
Roblox വീഡിയോകൾക്കായി @OPGamerBlox സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബുചെയ്യുക ❤️

വീഡിയോ ആസ്വദിച്ചുവെങ്കിൽ, ദയവായി ലൈക്ക് ചെയ്‌ത് പങ്കിടുക. 

1976 ലെ പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമത്തിലെ സെക്ഷൻ 107 പ്രകാരം പകർപ്പവകാശ നിരാകരണം, വിമർശനം, അഭിപ്രായം, വാർത്താ റിപ്പോർട്ടിംഗ്, അധ്യാപനം, സ്കോളർഷിപ്പ്, വിദ്യാഭ്യാസം, ഗവേഷണം തുടങ്ങിയ ആവശ്യങ്ങൾക്ക് "ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗത്തിന്" അനുമതി നൽകിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമങ്ങൾ അനുവദിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഉപയോഗമാണ് ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗം, അല്ലാത്തപക്ഷം അത് ലംഘിക്കപ്പെടാം.

మీకు ఈ వీడియో నచ్చిందని ఆశిస్తున్నాను, నచ్చితే దయచేసి వీడియోను లైక్ చేసి, షేర్ చేయండి.

1976 కాపీరైట్ చట్టంలోని సెక్షన్ 107 ప్రకారం, విమర్శ, వ్యాఖ్య, వార్తా నివేదన, బోధన, పాండిత్యం, విద్య మరియు పరిశోధన వంటి ప్రయోజనాల కోసం "న్యాయమైన ఉపయోగం" అనుమతించబడుతుంది.

న్యాయమైన ఉపయోగం అనేది కాపీరైట్ చట్టాల ద్వారా అనుమతించబడిన ఒక ఉపయోగం, లేకపోతే అది ఉల్లంఘన కావచ్చు.

ਰੋਬਲੋਕਸ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ @OPGamerBlox ਨੂੰ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ ❤️

🤗 ਇੰਸਟਾਗ੍ਰਾਮ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/ 

ਮੈਨੂੰ ਉਮੀਦ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਇਆ ਹੋਵੇਗਾ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਕ ਅਤੇ ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਕਰੋ। 

ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਅਸਵੀਕਾਰਨ 1976 ਦੇ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਐਕਟ ਦੀ ਧਾਰਾ 107 ਦੇ ਤਹਿਤ, ਆਲੋਚਨਾ, ਟਿੱਪਣੀ, ਖ਼ਬਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਿਪੋਰਟਿੰਗ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ, ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਖੋਜ ਵਰਗੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ "ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ" ਦੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਕਾਨੂੰਨਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਆਗਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਰ ਉਲੰਘਣਾ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

snippet.title: Sabba - Sach Jani | Pranjal Dahiya | Proud | New Punjabi Songs 2026
snippet.description:
#SachJani #Sabba #PranjalDahiya #Proud
Experience the ultimate expression of love! ❤️ Sabba teams up with the sensational Pranjal Dahiya for "Sach Jani," a soulful masterpiece from the hit album 'Proud.'

With deep lyrics that resonate with every heart, "Sach Jani" beautifully captures the devotion of a partner who loves as unconditionally as a mother. Featuring a captivating performance by Pranjal Dahiya and the signature sounds of Black Virus, this is the love anthem of 2026.

snippet.title: मैं तेरे प्यार में पागल | Prem Bandhan | Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar Songs
snippet.description:
🎶 Immerse yourself in the timeless romance of Kishore Kumar and Lata Mangeshkar with 'Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal' from the movie Prem Bandhan! Relive the magic of 1979, as these legendary voices weave a tale of love and longing. Let the nostalgic melodies transport you to an era of pure emotions and heartfelt expressions.

Experience the golden era of Bollywood with this enchanting duet, a testament to the unparalleled artistry of Kishore Da and Lata Ji. Feel the depth of emotion in every note as they serenade your soul with their unforgettable voices. This song is a treasure trove of memories, capturing the essence of love in its purest form.



Credits :

Song: Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal
Album: Prem Bandhan
Artist: Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 


Lyrics :

Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghumti hoon
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Sawan ko dhundti hoom
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Aur chatakne lagti hai
Kitni kaliya kaliyo mein
Main tera pata sabhi se
Aise puchhta hu jaise main koi
Bhula rahi manjil ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Aankhe aankhe
Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Kitni gehari jhil hai ye
Jhil se gehari do aankhe
Main teri in aankho mein
Aise dubti hu jaise main koi
Tuti naiya manjhe ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Tu ho na ho aankho mein
Rahti teri surat hai
Ye man prem ka mandir hai
Jisme teri ye murat hai
Main teri is murat ko
Aise pujti hoon jaise main koi
Vyakul radha mohan ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Sawan ko dhundti hoon
Barkha ko dhundata hoon.

If this song touched your heart, please give it a like, share your favorite classic Hindi song in the comments, and subscribe for more timeless melodies! Let the magic of music live on… ✨

Relive the magic of 1979, as these legendary voices weave a tale of love and longing. Let the nostalgic melodies transport you to an era of pure emotions and heartfelt expressions.

Experience the golden era of Bollywood with this enchanting duet, a testament to the unparalleled artistry of Kishore Da and Lata Ji. Feel the depth of emotion in every note as they serenade your soul with their unforgettable voices. This song is a treasure trove of memories, capturing the essence of love in its purest form.



Credits :

Song: Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal
Album: Prem Bandhan
Artist: Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 


Lyrics :

Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghumti hoon
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Sawan ko dhundti hoom
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Aur chatakne lagti hai
Kitni kaliya kaliyo mein
Main tera pata sabhi se
Aise puchhta hu jaise main koi
Bhula rahi manjil ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Aankhe aankhe
Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Kitni gehari jhil hai ye
Jhil se gehari do aankhe
Main teri in aankho mein
Aise dubti hu jaise main koi
Tuti naiya manjhe ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Tu ho na ho aankho mein
Rahti teri surat hai
Ye man prem ka mandir hai
Jisme teri ye murat hai
Main teri is murat ko
Aise pujti hoon jaise main koi
Vyakul radha mohan ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Sawan ko dhundti hoon
Barkha ko dhundata hoon.

If this song touched your heart, please give it a like, share your favorite classic Hindi song in the comments, and subscribe for more timeless melodies! Let the magic of music live on… ✨

snippet.description:
💖 Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 💖

Is khoobsurat gaane “Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna” mein mehsoos karein sacche pyaar ki gehraai ❤️ Yeh hindi song har us dil ke liye hai jise kabhi kisi se sachcha pyaar hua ho… chahe wo milan ho ya judai 💔

🎶 Soft music, emotional lyrics aur soulful vibes ke saath yeh romantic song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jayega. Jaise ek moonlight night mein ek lantern chamakta hai, waise hi yeh love story aapke dil ko roshan karegi.

ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛ ᴅɪsᴄʟᴀɪᴍᴇʀ ᴜɴᴅᴇʀ sᴇᴄᴛɪᴏɴ 107 ᴏғ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛ ᴀᴄᴛ 1976 ᴛʜᴇ ᴀʟʟᴏᴡᴀɴᴄᴇ ᴡᴀs ᴍᴀᴅᴇ ғᴏʀ ''ғᴀɪʀ ᴜsᴇ''  ғᴏʀ ᴘᴜʀᴘᴏsᴇ sᴜᴄʜ ᴀs ᴄʀɪᴛɪᴄɪsᴍs ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴇɴᴛ ɴᴇᴡs ʀᴇᴘᴏʀᴛɪɴɢ ᴛᴇᴀᴄʜɪɴɢ sᴄʜᴏʟᴀʀsʜɪᴘ ᴀɴᴅ ʀᴇsᴇᴀʀᴄʜ ғᴀɪʀ ᴜsᴇ ɪs ᴀ ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛ ʟᴀᴡ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ᴡɪʟʟ ᴡɪʟʟ ᴏᴛʜᴇʀᴡɪsᴇ ʙᴇ ɪɴғʀɪɴɢɪɴɢ ɴᴏɴ-ᴘʀᴏғɪᴛ ᴇᴅᴜᴄᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏʀ ᴘᴇʀsᴏɴᴀʟ ᴜsᴇ ɪғ ʏᴏᴜ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ᴀɴʏ ᴘʀᴏʙʟᴇᴍ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴀᴄᴛ ᴜs ᴡᴇ ᴡɪʟʟ ʀᴇᴏᴍᴠᴇ ᴏᴜʀ ᴠɪᴅᴇᴏ ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ɢɪᴠᴇ ʜᴀᴛᴇ ᴛʜᴀɴᴋs

snippet.title: Toota Jo Kabhi Tara 8K Video | A Flying Jatt | Tiger Shroff, Jacqueline | Sumedha K | Sachin Jigar
snippet.description:
Experience pure romance with Toota Jo Kabhi Tara from the movie A Flying Jatt, featuring the charming on‑screen chemistry of Tiger Shroff and Jacqueline Fernandez.
🎶 Beautifully composed by the talented Sachin–Jigar, this song expresses love, hope, and emotional connection through soulful melodies and heartfelt moments. Presented in 8K Ultra HD, the visuals are richer, sharper, and more immersive than ever, enhancing every romantic scene.

Title : Toota Jo Kabhi Tara
Singer: Sumedha Karmahe
Lyrics : Priya Saraiya
Music : Sachin-Jigar
Arrangers/Programmers : Sachin-Jigar & Tanuj Tiku
Mixed&Mastered at : Future Sound of Bombay by Eric Pillai
Strings - Chennai Strings
Flute - Naveen Kumar
Music Production Head : Romil Ved

Cast : Tiger Shroff, Jacqueline Fernandez
Banner : Balaji Motion Pictures
Producer : Shobha Kapoor & Ekta Kapoor
Director : Remo D'Souza



Music on Zee Music Company

ईश्वर को परमात्मा कहा जाता है, अथवा यथार्थ रूप में परमात्मा को ही भगवान, रचता सर्वशक्तिमान के रूप में जाना जाता है l इसका अर्थ है कि वह सभी आत्माओं में सर्वोच्च आत्मा है। परमात्मा हम सर्व आत्माओ के पिता (father) है, जो हमे सुख और शांति का अविनाशी वर्षा देते है l आत्माओं की तरह, भगवान प्रकाश का ही एक सूक्ष्म बिंदु है, लेकिन मानव आत्माओं के विपरीत, वो आत्मा जन्म और मृत्यु के चक्र से परे है, अर्थात चक्र मे नही आते और कर्मों के फल - सुख वा दुख की अनुभूति नही करते, अर्थात वो अकर्ता है, सत्य है। भगवान सभी मानव आत्माओं का सर्वोच्च पिता, माता, शिक्षक, सखा और सतगुरु है। हम उनको केवल कठिन समय में ही याद है, यह हमारे भीतर ऐसा अंतर्निहित है। हम परमपिता को अपने दुख के समय मे ही याद करते है, यह हुमारे मन बुद्धि मे इतने तक बैठा हुआ है की वो ही हमारा शांति-दाता है।

ईश्वर को परमात्मा कहा जाता है, अथवा यथार्थ रूप में परमात्मा को ही भगवान, रचता सर्वशक्तिमान के रूप में जाना जाता है l इसका अर्थ है कि वह सभी आत्माओं में सर्वोच्च आत्मा है। परमात्मा हम सर्व आत्माओ के पिता (father) है, जो हमे सुख और शांति का अविनाशी वर्षा देते है l आत्माओं की तरह, भगवान प्रकाश का ही एक सूक्ष्म बिंदु है, लेकिन मानव आत्माओं के विपरीत, वो आत्मा जन्म और मृत्यु के चक्र से परे है, अर्थात चक्र मे नही आते और कर्मों के फल - सुख वा दुख की अनुभूति नही करते, अर्थात वो अकर्ता है, सत्य है। भगवान सभी मानव आत्माओं का सर्वोच्च पिता, माता, शिक्षक, सखा और सतगुरु है। हम उनको केवल कठिन समय में ही याद है, यह हमारे भीतर ऐसा अंतर्निहित है। हम परमपिता को अपने दुख के समय मे ही याद करते है, यह हुमारे मन बुद्धि मे इतने तक बैठा हुआ है की वो ही हमारा शांति-दाता है।

હે ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
હે વિખુટા પાડવાની વાત કરી ત્યારે રોયતા   
હે વિખુટા પાડવાની વાત કરી ત્યારે રોયતા 
મારી હારે જીવવાના સપના તમે જોયાતા
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
હો જોયા તમને બીજા હારે દિલ તૂટ્યું મારુ એજ દાડે 
જોયા તમને બીજા હારે દિલ તૂટ્યું મારુ એજ દાડે 
હે પેલી નજરે મારા થી મન મોયાતા  
હોમું હસી ને મુખડા મલકાયાતા 
હે ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે...

હો અમે રાખ્યું એટલું કોઈ ના રાખી શકે 
મારા પ્રેમ ની તોલે કોઈ પ્રેમ ના આવી શકે 
હો હાજર થઇ જતા અમે તારા સુખે દુઃખે 
તને મળી સાયબી મારા હાલ ચોય થી પૂછે 
હો હતા અમે તને મોનીતા દગો કરી ને માર્યા જીવતા 
હતા અમે તને મોનીતા દગો કરી ને માર્યા જીવતા 
હે મારી લોબી ઉંમર માટે તમે દુવા કરતાતા 
આખું આયખું મારા નોમે કરવા માંગતતા 
હે ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે...

હો તારા બડે ની તારીખ હું યાદ રાખતો  
બડે તારો આવેને ગિફ્ટ મોંઘી આપતો 
હો પોણી ના રેલે જ્યાં બધા લડાવેલા લાડકોડ 
રામસીતા જેવી તૂટી અમારી જોડ 
હો ફરતા રેશું અમે ગમ માં તારા 
બાળ્યા ગોડી તે કાળજા અમારા   
ફરતા રેશું અમે ગમ માં તારા 
બાળ્યા ગોડી તે કાળજા અમારા 
હે મારા માટે નકોડા તમે રેતતા 
મને પામવા ની મંનતો તમે રાખતાંતા
હે ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે...

localized.description:
Jhankar Music Gujarati Presents Latest love Video Song titled "Cham Mari Godi Have Rom Khoya Se - ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે" Sung by Rakesh Barot, & Penned by Vipul Raval, Pravin Raval & Music Composed By Ravi Nagar, Rahul Nadiya Starring: Rakesh Barot, Chhaya Thakor & Concept Director by Faruk Gayakwad
-------------------------
Join this channel :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQeljbfXMX_5a2_KMXTkF-A/join

melody woven with love, and deep emotions, this title song beautifully captures the essence of heartfelt. 💕🎶

પ્રેમ અને ઊંડી લાગણીઓથી વણાયેલ આ શીર્ષક ગીત હૃદયસ્પર્શી ભાવના ના સારને સુંદર રીતે કેદ કરે છે. 💕🎶

To Make Insta Reels Click here : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/996291486084813/

🎧 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐬  
♪ Song : Cham Mari Godi Have Rom Khoya Se 
♪ Singer : Rakesh Barot
♪ Lyrics : Vipul Raval, Pravin Raval
♪ Music : Ravi Nagar, Rahul Nadiya
♪ Studio : Dhoon Digital Recording Studio - Adalaj

🎬 𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐕𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐬
♪ Producer : MAARSS MOVIES AND MUSIC LLP (JHANKAR MUSIC)
♪ Concept & Director : Faruk Gayakwad
♪ Starring : Rakesh Barot, Chhaya Thakor
♪ DOP : Sehzad Mansuri (Tipu)
♪ Editing : Naresh Rajput
♪ Rakesh Barot Costume Designer : Manisha R Barot 
♪ Makeup-Hair : Hashmukh Limbachiya
♪ Poster Design : Pradip Karbatiya
♪ Ganre : Gujarati Love Song
♪ Music Label : Jhankar Music

#rakeshbarot #newgujaratisong #rakeshbarotnewsong #jhankarmusicgujarati 

Listen and Download Song on : 🎶
♪ I Tunes : https://surl.li/nkmcrv
♪ JioSaavn : https://surl.li/jrinwz
♪ Spotify : https://surl.li/msxpks
♪ Gaana : https://surl.li/zrafpc
♪ Amazon Music : https://surl.lu/dmvndv
♪ YouTube Music : https://surl.li/euwtcd
♪ Instagram Reels : https://surl.li/fsffxk
♪ Apple Music : https://surl.li/nkmcrv
------------------------------
📝 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬: Gujarati👇

હે ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
હે વિખુટા પાડવાની વાત કરી ત્યારે રોયતા   
હે વિખુટા પાડવાની વાત કરી ત્યારે રોયતા 
મારી હારે જીવવાના સપના તમે જોયાતા
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
હો જોયા તમને બીજા હારે દિલ તૂટ્યું મારુ એજ દાડે 
જોયા તમને બીજા હારે દિલ તૂટ્યું મારુ એજ દાડે 
હે પેલી નજરે મારા થી મન મોયાતા  
હોમું હસી ને મુખડા મલકાયાતા 
હે ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે...

હો અમે રાખ્યું એટલું કોઈ ના રાખી શકે 
મારા પ્રેમ ની તોલે કોઈ પ્રેમ ના આવી શકે 
હો હાજર થઇ જતા અમે તારા સુખે દુઃખે 
તને મળી સાયબી મારા હાલ ચોય થી પૂછે 
હો હતા અમે તને મોનીતા દગો કરી ને માર્યા જીવતા 
હતા અમે તને મોનીતા દગો કરી ને માર્યા જીવતા 
હે મારી લોબી ઉંમર માટે તમે દુવા કરતાતા 
આખું આયખું મારા નોમે કરવા માંગતતા 
હે ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે...

હો તારા બડે ની તારીખ હું યાદ રાખતો  
બડે તારો આવેને ગિફ્ટ મોંઘી આપતો 
હો પોણી ના રેલે જ્યાં બધા લડાવેલા લાડકોડ 
રામસીતા જેવી તૂટી અમારી જોડ 
હો ફરતા રેશું અમે ગમ માં તારા 
બાળ્યા ગોડી તે કાળજા અમારા   
ફરતા રેશું અમે ગમ માં તારા 
બાળ્યા ગોડી તે કાળજા અમારા 
હે મારા માટે નકોડા તમે રેતતા 
મને પામવા ની મંનતો તમે રાખતાંતા
હે ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે 
ચમ મારી ગોડી હવે રોમ ખોયા સે... 
-------------------------------
રાકેશ બારોટ ના અન્ય ગીતો નિહાળવા માટે નીચે આપેલી લિંક ક્લિક કરો:👇

https://youtu.be/gyI9Nx9aPg8

snippet.title: Can't Leave the Red Circle in Minecraft!!
snippet.description:
Today, a bunch of evil villagers have kidnapped our families! Now, they're forcing us to survive a massive zombie swarm if we want to save them, but we're not allowed the leave these red circles! We don't have a choice, we have to create security houses capable of surviving the zombie attack in order to save our families!

We hope you enjoy our videos! Have a great day!

bn.title: সোলনাকুল দ্য আর্কিটেক্ট 🧠 | টিম সোল #১ একটি বিশেষ কারণে | বিএমপিএস তৃতীয় দিন
bn.description:
📷 ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/mrspike10/

ডিসকর্ডে আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 👇
https://discord.com/invite/2pejjUbCKj

▶️ দ্বিতীয় চ্যানেল - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCasVrVp-Lr0ynmxFeXRG3oQ

📧mrspikeinquiry@gmail.com

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

✅কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ফেয়ার ইউজের (ন্যায্য ব্যবহার) পাল্লা ভারী থাকে।

✅ভিডিও গেম ডিসক্লেইমার: এই ভিডিওর বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক ব্যবহারের জন্য। গেমপ্লেটি হলো Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI) নামক একটি ভিডিও গেম এবং এটি একটি কাল্পনিক সৃষ্টি।

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
✅যারা আমার ভিডিও দেখেন, লাইক, শেয়ার এবং কমেন্ট করেন, তাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ। আপনাদের কাছে এটি হয়তো একটি ছোট বিষয় মনে হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনাদের প্রত্যেককে আন্তরিকভাবে ধন্যবাদ জানাই। আপনাদের দেওয়া সমস্ত মতামত এবং মন্তব্যই আমাদের চ্যানেলকে আজকের এই পর্যায়ে নিয়ে আসতে সাহায্য করেছে।
তাই আবারও, আপনাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ!!! 😍

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

snippet.title: BAVA BAVA Lyrical | CITYLIGHTS | Vinay Rajkumar | Monisha Vijaykumar | Charan Raj | Vijaya Kumar
snippet.description:
🔥 Warning: Extreme Mass Alert! 🚨 BAVA BAVA is finally here
Presenting The BAVA BAVA Lyrical from the Movie #CITYLIGHTS  Starring : Vinay Rajkumar, Monisha Vijaykumar & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 
-----------------------------------------
#CITYLIGHTS #bavabava #citylightsmovie #vinayrajkumar #anandaudio  
#duniyavijaykumar  #charanraj #monishavijaykumar  #youtube #ankithkumar  
-----------------------------------------
Lyrics by Ankith Kumar 
Follow on: https://www.instagram.com/ankith_kumarr/

Lyrics:
Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna ka un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka

Eh patte Kya re khana kaya 
Mamu ka dukhan meh by two chaya
Pileko hojata dimaku Maya 
Shivajinagar meh nalli ka paya

Bat alli bitre odyod onde shotuu
Nenskobek makla niv harishchandra ghatu
Touch madthini anod beda ma thougtuu
Vade paisa aksthini kalskodla date uuu...

Odu odu odu tirgbeda hinde 
Yamunange kansthini annamun munde
Yak hutde antha ning ansbeko munde
Good morning helalla kaldoithya Sunday 

Thilkondu  fight madu alka nan magne
Baik bandid boglmana badko ya magne
En thanteg barmana udrushu pallu
Ammaniiiii bandaka pullu

Nangle niyathkal manshru 
Eppunu engluke ben hinde vakraga sooori
Niyath kala illa  illi nambidake jothe idu game adi akidu choori

Thinrudu sheesh kali baluk mav Adada etu 
dodthale ethnappa kudkurdu rate uuuu...
Thale kedskolalla nanu hidkyoke slate uuu
Estojana ote urig madode hate uuu

Onak sheesh thindotu daulattu peshii
Draggeruu nugshanaka barodilla teshii
Sadilde nin body Kalsthini kaashi
Gothilde hutidya gothilla Raashi

Parents ge yavathu ursbeda otte 
Avr mathu kellilla jail uta thatte
Sirki savasu ni shekmana kotte 
Sheknaka un lifuuu bod bod motte 

Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka
---------- 
*Bava Bava - Music Credits*
All tracks Composed, Arranged and Produced by Charan Raj
Vocals – Ankith Kumar
Lyrics - Ankith Kumar
Guitars - Sunil Silvester
Percussions - Karthik Vamshi
Additional Programming - Raghothama NS, Vignesh Shankar
Music Supervision - Ananth Kamath M
Recording Engineers - Amal Mithu
Studio Session Manager – Vignesh Raj @ 2barQ Studios
Mixed and Mastered - Aniket Mohanty
-----------------------

snippet.title: IMAYE (Official Lyric Video) | Shabir Sulthan | Srinisha Jayaseelan | Roshan Jamrock
snippet.description:
‘IMAYE’ is a cinematic Tamil melody that blends classic melody, rap, R&B and Indian semi-classical influences into a contemporary soundscape.

Composed and written by Shabir Sulthan, the song is performed by Shabir Sulthan alongside Srinisha Jayaseelan and Roshan Jamrock. ‘IMAYE’ also serves as the official opening soundtrack of Mediacorp’s hit series Must Date The Playboy directed by trendsetting filmmaker T Suriavelan. 

Available on all major streaming platforms. 

Listen to IMAYE on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/6l9QzVbtnlN4BTrO7ZQZ3O?si=4250d42c6ff040f7

Listen to IMAYE on Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/gb/song/imaye-feat-srinisha-jayaseelan-roshan-jamrock/1894750739

snippet.description:
Free Fire Max Asia Invitational 2026 Spring kicks off with the South Asia Play-Ins, featuring top teams from India, Bangladesh, Nepal, and Pakistan.

Day 1 of SA Play-Ins: GROUP B vs GROUP C

The top 8 teams from SA Play-Ins will qualify to the Main Event on May 14

Group B
♦ GodLike Esports
♦ GG Instinct
♦ Autobotz Esports
♦ Team 2xD
♦ Extreme EX
♦ RZX Esports

Group C

♦ RNX Esports

snippet.title: Tere Liye - Lyrical - Prince | Vivek  Atif Aslam, Shreya Ghoshal I Sachin Gupta l Dance Songs
snippet.description:
Let the enchanting voices of Atif Aslam and Shreya Ghoshal serenade your soul as you experience the magic of true love through their heartfelt rendition

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
    / tipsofficial  ​

Song Credits:
Singer(s): Atif Aslam, Shreya Ghoshal
Music Director: Sachin Gupta
Lyricist: Sameer
Edit & Gfx : Nadeem Akhtar (Paperboyz Studioz)

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films
Director: Kookie Gulati
Cast: Vivek Oberoi, Nandana Sen, Aruna Shields, Neeru Bajwa, Sanjay Kapoor & Dalip Tahil


Song Lyrics:

Jaagi Jaagi Soyi Na Main Saari Raat Tere Liye
Bheegi Bheegi Palkein Meri Udaas Tere Liye
Ho Jaagi Jaagi Soyi Na Main Saari Raat Tere Liye
Bheegi Bheegi Palkein Meri Udaas Tere Liye
Akhiyaan Bichhayi Maine Tere Liye
Duniya Bhulayi Maine Tere Liye

Jannatein Sajaayi Maine Tere Liye
Chhod Di Khudaai Maine Tere Liye
Jannatein Sajaayi Maine Tere Liye
Chhod Di Khudaai
Ooo…
Tere Liye Jhoomu Deewana Ban Ke Tere Liye

Tune Kyun Meri Duniya Ujaad Di, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

snippet.description:
eggchan is gone

Searching For My Friend Who Went Missing

Unstable SMP:
➜   @FlameFragsMC 
➜    @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨  @Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨  @wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc @FlameFragsMC @Lomedy @JadenMAN 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@nombra101 (flamefrags motif!)
https://www.youtube.com/@Kalamity_Music (aria math remix!)


This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), orchestralis, soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

snippet.title: Bahut Pyaar Karte Hai | Rimsha Khan | Saajan | Madhuri Dixit | 90's Hindi Romantic Songs
snippet.description:
Bahut Pyar Karte Hai Tumko Sanam | Rimsha Khan | Tiktok Viral Song | Irfan Production

#bahutpyaarkartehai #saajansongs #madhuridixit

Song : Bahut Pyar Karte Hain
Singer : Anuradha Paudwal
Music : Nadeem - Shravan
Lyrics : Sameer
Movie : Saajan

Lyrics : 
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Kasam chaahe le lo
Kasam chaahe le lo khuda ki kasam

Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam

Hamari ghazal hai tasavvur tumhara
Hamari ghazal hai tasavvur tumhara

Tumhare bina ab na jeena Gawara

Tumhein yunhi  hi chaahenge
Tumhein yunhi  hi chaahenge jab tak hai dum

Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam 

Sagar ki baahon mein maujein hain jitni
Sagar ki baahon mein maujein hain jitni

Humko bhi tumse mohabbat hai utni

Ke yeh bekarari
Ke yeh bekarari na ab hogi kam

Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam

Kasam chaahe le lo
Kasam chaahe le lo khuda ki kasam

Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
 #OldHindiSongs #BahutPyarKarteHaiTumkoSanam #HindiCover
Presenting my heartfelt recreation of “Bahut Pyar Karte Hai Tumko Sanam” ❤️

This timeless melody carries deep love, devotion, and emotional sincerity that has touched listeners for years. In this recreated version, I have tried to preserve the soulful tenderness, romantic intensity, and classic emotional beauty associated with the original while presenting it through my own musical interpretation and style.

This cover has been independently conceptualized, arranged, recorded, produced, and vocally refined by me as a personalized musical reinterpretation. My intention with this recreation was not to simply repeat an existing rendition, but to present it with sincerity, emotional depth, and a graceful classical touch for listeners who connect with evergreen Hindi melodies and heartfelt expressions of love.

Through this Hindi Retro Reimagined presentation, I wanted to bring together nostalgia, softness, and timeless romance in a way that feels both respectful to the original spirit and fresh in its own expression. My aim was to create a version that feels intimate, soulful, and emotionally immersive for every listener who connects with the beauty of classic Hindi music.

If you enjoyed this version, please Like, Share, Comment, and Subscribe for more soulful recreations, timeless classics, and emotionally driven musical performances.

🎧 Best experienced with headphones for full depth and atmosphere.

Credits:
Title: Bahut Pyar Karte Hai Tumko Sanam
Category: Classical Recreation / Hindi Retro Reimagined
Recreated Cover: Deepak Pandey

This is a personal musical reinterpretation created in my own style.
All rights to any underlying original literary or musical material belong to their respective copyright owners.

snippet.title: मेरा चाँद मुझे आया है नज़र | Mr. Aashiq | Kumar Sanu Songs | Saif Ali Khan | Twinkle Khanna
snippet.description:
🎶 Dive into the soulful world of Kumar Sanu with this timeless classic, 'Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar' from the movie Mr. Aashiq! Relive the magic of 90s Bollywood romance with this unforgettable melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Kumar Sanu's voice is pure emotion, weaving stories of affection and heartbreak that resonate even today. His contribution to Indian music is immeasurable, and this song is a testament to his incredible talent.

This video features the beautifully crafted song 'Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar', transporting you back to a golden era of Bollywood music. Experience the charm, the passion, and the sheer artistry of this iconic song.



Credits :

Song: Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar
Album: Mr. Aashiq
Artist: Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Jatin-Lalit
Lyricist: Indiwar 



Lyrics :

Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Chhaya hai nasha meri aankho par
Chhaya hai nasha meri aankho par
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar


Mere dil mein hai arma kai kai
Meri chahat hai abhi nayi nayi
Mere dil mein hai arma kai kai
Meri chahat hai abhi nayi nayi
Reh jaye na pyasa pyar mera
Meri baahon mein bhar de yaar mera
Itana sa karam tu kar mujh par
Itana sa karam tu kar mujh par
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar


Abhi labo ko labo ne chhua nahi
Arma koi pura hua nahi
Abhi labo ko labo ne chhua nahi
Arma koi pura hua nahi
Abhi aash ka gulshan khilana hai
Abhi do jismo ko milna hai
Dekhuga abhi main wo manjar
Dekhuga abhi main wo manjar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aaya hai nazar, aaya hai nazar

If you enjoyed this trip down memory lane, please give this video a like! Share your favorite Kumar Sanu song in the comments below, and don't forget to subscribe for more classic Bollywood melodies. Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.title: मैं पान बन जाउंगी | शिवानी का सबसे बेस्ट डांस | Main Paan Ban Jaungi | Rasiya Dj Remix
snippet.description:
मैं पान बन जाउंगी | शिवानी का सबसे बेस्ट डांस | Main Paan Ban Jaungi | Rasiya Dj Remix
मैं पान बन जाउंगी | शिवानी का सबसे बेस्ट डांस | Main Paan Ban Jaungi | Rasiya Dj Remix
मैं पान बन जाउंगी | शिवानी का सबसे बेस्ट डांस | Main Paan Ban Jaungi | Rasiya Dj Remix

नमस्ते दोस्तों! Trimurti Cassettes पर आपका स्वागत है।

आज के इस खास वीडियो में देखिए शिवानी का अब तक का सबसे धमाकेदार और जबरदस्त डांस परफॉर्मेंस - "मैं पान बन जाउंगी"। इस रसिया DJ रीमिक्स गाने पर शिवानी के लटके-झटकों ने धूम मचा दी है। अगर आप भी देहाती डांस और रसिया गानों के शौकीन हैं, तो यह वीडियो सिर्फ आपके लिए है!

वीडियो में क्या खास है?

शिवानी का बेहतरीन देहाती स्टेप्स।

हाई-क्वालिटी DJ रीमिक्स साउंड।

शादी और पार्टियों के लिए बेस्ट डांस नंबर।

अगर आपको शिवानी का यह डांस पसंद आया हो, तो वीडियो को LIKE करें, SHARE करें और हमारे चैनल को SUBSCRIBE करना न भूलें ताकि आप ऐसे ही और भी मजेदार डांस वीडियो देख सकें!

🎵 Song Details: 
🔹 Song: Paan Ban Jaungi
🔹 Singer: Shivani
🔹 Writer: Munendra Prem
🔹 Music: Sonotek GRP Bros ( Surya Panchal )
🔹Edit By: Sonotek
🔹Design By: Sonotek Payal Bhatiya
🔹 Category: Rasiya/Lokgeet

snippet.title: లలిత సహస్రనామం వింటే ఆరోగ్యం, ఐశ్వర్యం, సౌభాగ్యం కలుగుతుంది | Lalitha Sahasranam Stotram
snippet.description:
లలిత సహస్రనామం వింటే ఆరోగ్యం, ఐశ్వర్యం, సౌభాగ్యం కలుగుతుంది | Lalitha Sahasranam Stotram

Listen to the sacred Sri Lalitha Sahasranama Stotram and experience the divine blessings of Goddess Lalitha Devi. 🙏

It is believed that listening to Lalitha Sahasranamam even once can bring health, wealth, prosperity, and good fortune into your life. This powerful stotram removes negativity, brings peace of mind, and fills your home with positive energy and abundance.

In this video, you can listen to the full Lalitha Sahasranama Stotram with Telugu lyrics, making it easy to follow and chant along.

snippet.title: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
snippet.description:
#radha #radharani #radhakrishna
#radha #radharani #radhakrishna #radhabhajan #bhajanlyrics #krishnabhajan 
 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा |Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko|Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan#radha 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan


मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Song: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan


Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Palak  Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

snippet.title: शनिवार स्पेशल | नॉनस्टॉप शनिदेव जी भजन | New Shanidev Bhajan 2026 | Shani Bhajans | Shani Dev Bhajan
snippet.description:
शनिवार स्पेशल | नॉनस्टॉप शनिदेव जी भजन | New Shanidev Bhajan 2026 | Shani Bhajans | Shani Dev Bhajan


तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏


⭐Song :
सच्चा शनिदेव तेरा दरबार 
शनिदेव तेरी महिमा सारे जग
श्री शनिदेव अमृतवाणी
शनिदेव तुम्हारे चरणों में तन मन 
शनिदेव तेरा जग में अजब नज़ारा 
कोई तुझसा नहीं दातार शनि
शनि के चरणों में जो शीश झुकाएगा
श्री शनिदेव के 108 नाम
शनि जी करदो बेड़ा पार
श्री शनि देव जी की आरती

⭐Singer : Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

snippet.title: My Last Video
snippet.description:
my last video...
Nahi socha tha ki kabhi aisi video banani padegi... 💔
Socha tha ye mera aakhri video hoga, par sachai saamne lana zaroori tha. Jisne ye copyright strike di hai, usne na sirf channel ko 7 din mein delete karwane ki dhamki di hai, balki peeche se abuses bhi kiye hain. Is video mein saara sach aur unka double face expose kiya hai.

Mera hamesha se focus aap logo ke liye best content lane par raha hai, par ab aage kya hoga mujhe khud nahi pata. Poori situation video mein explain ki hai. Agar aap logo ne hamesha support kiya hai, toh aaj aapki sabse zyada zaroorat hai.

snippet.title: Paal Dabba - Psilovibin (Music Video) || Prod. Foxn
snippet.description:
psilovibin

This song is about my journey from a quiet kid to finally be able to express myself. I’ve replaced
doubt with discipline and hard work. It isn't luck; it’s about learning from mistakes, staying true to myself, and finally owning my own path.

Starring: Paal Dabba
Special Appearance: Trisha Krishnan 
Music : Foxn
Mix & Master: Akash Shravan 
Additional vocals: Mary Ann Alexander, Irfan Erooth.

The giant water slide leads directly into a HUGE Skull’s Mouth hidden deep inside a secret island! 🌊☠️ Franklin & Shinchan decide to explore the mysterious slide, but what they discover inside is absolutely terrifying! 😨
